-- FULL FILE compiles (exit 0). keystone assembles from per_term (STEP 0-7 all mechanical/clean).
-- Two sorries: (1) taylorCollapse — a VERIFIED brick (keystone_base.lean compiles clean), stubbed
-- only for speed; (2) per_term — the IRREDUCIBLE cleared-vs-uncleared mismatch (NOT a missing lemma).
-- File: /home/nubs/Git/ArkLib/_scratch_proofs/asm1.lean

theorem keystone (x₀ : F) (R : F[X][X][Y]) (hHyp : ClaimA2.Hypotheses x₀ R H) (t : ℕ) :
    RestrictedFaaDiBrunoPartitionMatchAt H x₀ R hHyp t := by
  unfold RestrictedFaaDiBrunoPartitionMatchAt restrictedFaaDiBrunoPartitionForm restrictedMatchRecursionPartitionForm
  simp only []
  rw [show PowerSeries.coeff 0 (βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp) = α₀ H by
        rw [PowerSeries.coeff_zero_eq_constantCoeff_apply, βHenselAssembled_constantCoeff]]   -- STEP0
  rw [Finset.sum_comm, Finset.Nat.sum_antidiagonal_eq_sum_range_succ_mk]                        -- STEP1+2
  rw [sum_div', Finset.mul_sum, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro i1 hi1
  simp only [Finset.mem_range] at hi1
  rw [depSwap H (c := t + 1 - i1)                                                               -- STEP3
        (A := fun x => liftToFunctionField (H:=H) ((evalX (C x₀) (hasseDerivX i1 R)).coeff x))
        (g := fun x lam => (x.choose lam.parts.card * lam.parts.countPerms) •
              (α₀ H ^ (x - lam.parts.card) *
                (Multiset.map (fun j => (PowerSeries.coeff j) (βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp)) lam.parts).prod))
        (Q := fun lam => (t + 1) ∉ lam.parts)]
  rw [mul_div_assoc', Finset.mul_sum]
  rw [div_eq_mul_inv, Finset.sum_mul]
  simp only [← div_eq_mul_inv]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro lam hlam
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hlam
  exact per_term H x₀ R hHyp t i1 hi1 lam hlam

-- per_term reaches the bare obstruction (STEP4 lhs_isum_collapse PROVEN; STEP5 partitionProd_coeff_assembled;
-- STEP6 implicit; STEP7 brickE + B_coeff + embed_W𝒪 + ClaimA2.embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃_ξ + prefactor_eq_countPerms):
theorem per_term (x₀ : F) (R : F[X][X][Y]) (hHyp : ClaimA2.Hypotheses x₀ R H)
    (t i1 : ℕ) (hi1 : i1 < t + 1 + 1) (lam : Nat.Partition (t + 1 - i1)) (hlam : (t + 1) ∉ lam.parts) :
    (LHS i-sum) = ClaimA2.ζ * (W^(i1+δ-1) * ξ^(2i1+s-2) * emb(B_coeff) * emb(partitionProd)) / den := by
  rw [lhs_isum_collapse H x₀ R hHyp t i1 lam]
  rw [show (...).prod = partitionProd lam (fun l => PowerSeries.coeff l (βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp)) from rfl]
  rw [partitionProd_coeff_assembled H x₀ R hHyp lam]
  rw [brickE H x₀ R i1 lam.parts.card]
  rw [B_coeff, map_nsmul, embed_W𝒪, ClaimA2.embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃_ξ]
  simp only [sigmaLambda, prefactor_eq_countPerms]
  rw [embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃_mk]; unfold hasseCoeffRepr𝒪; rw [embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃_mk]
  -- BARE GOAL: LHS has liftBivariate(hasseCoeffRepr𝒪_cleared) = ∑cᵢW^(N-i)Tⁱ ;
  --            RHS has liftBivariate(p) = ∑cᵢTⁱ.  NO global W-power relates them. field_simp;ring FAILS.
  sorry

-- STEP4 sublemma, PROVEN (modulo verified taylorCollapse brick):
theorem lhs_isum_collapse (...) :
    ∑ i ∈ (range (Q.nd+1)).filter (card ≤ i), lift(coeff i)*(i.choose card * countPerms)•(α₀^(i-card)*∏coeff)
      = countPerms • (hasseEvalAtRoot H x₀ R i1 card * ∏coeff) := by
  set s := lam.parts.card; set cp := lam.parts.countPerms; set P := (...).prod
  have hext : (filtered sum) = (full-range sum) := by    -- drop filter: i.choose s = 0 for i < s
    apply Finset.sum_subset (Finset.filter_subset _ _)
    intro i hi hi'; simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range] at hi hi'
    rw [Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt (by omega : i < s)]; simp
  rw [hext]
  have hcollapse := taylorCollapse H x₀ R i1 s
  have key : (full sum) = cp • ((taylorCollapse sum) * P) := by
    simp only [nsmul_eq_mul, Nat.cast_mul, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro i _; ring
  rw [key, hcollapse]

CRITICAL FINDING — the keystone is NOT closeable as currently defined; it requires a one-line fix to an UPSTREAM DEFINITION (not a new lemma).

(1) The task's BRIDGE 1 is FALSE as literally stated. `hasseCoeffRepr𝒪 = mk p` (un-cleared) embeds to `liftBivariate p = eval₂ T p`, NOT `W^N·hasseEvalAtRoot`. I verified concretely (compiles, exit 0): `liftBivariate(X+1)=T+1` but `W·eval₂(T/W)(X+1)=T+W`, unequal since W=lift(lc H)≠1. The route in the prompt ("← W_pow_mul_eval₂_div_eq_liftBivariate (P:=p)") produces `liftBivariate(CLEARED sum)`, not `liftBivariate p`, so it cannot prove the un-cleared statement. The TRUE bridge (cleared) is already in-tree as `embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃_hasseCoeffRepr𝒪_cleared`; I packaged it as `bridge1_cleared` (sorry-free, axiom-clean).

(2) ROOT CAUSE of the keystone gap: `B_coeff` (HenselNumerator:597) = `prefactor • hasseCoeffRepr𝒪` uses the UN-CLEARED `hasseCoeffRepr𝒪 = mk p` (HenselNumerator:580). The RHS recursion form `restrictedMatchRecursionPartitionForm` (P2Assembly:67) inherits this. But the LHS Faà-di-Bruno sum collapses (taylorCollapse) to `hasseEvalAtRoot = eval₂(T/W) p`. The two meet at a term where LHS carries `liftBivariate(CLEARED)` and RHS carries `liftBivariate(p)` — structurally distinct (differ per-Y-degree by W^(N-i), no global W-power reconciles). Tellingly, `exponent_balance_W`'s own docstring (P2Vanish:118) says its residual `i+δ-2` is "the W-content ... the Y↦T vs Y↦T/W clearing, embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃_hasseCoeffRepr𝒪_cleared" — i.e. the assembly was DESIGNED around the CLEARED rep, but `B_coeff` was wired to the un-cleared one.

FIX (recommended, for whoever owns the source): change `B_coeff` to use `hasseCoeffRepr𝒪_cleared` (i.e. `mk (hasseCoeffRepr𝒪_cleared ...)`) instead of `hasseCoeffRepr𝒪`. Then STEP 7 uses `bridge1_cleared` directly and the LHS `brickE` form matches the RHS exactly; STEP 8 becomes pure W/ξ exponent arithmetic (exponent_balance_W/ξ in ℤ, all parts ≥1 so 2l-1 exact, d≥2). I confirmed even after a hypothetical cleared-swap the leftover is JUST that ℤ power arithmetic (field_simp leaves a W/ξ-power identity), so the keystone WOULD close once the rep is cleared.

(3) DELIVERABLES that compile (exit 0, /home/nubs/Git/ArkLib/_scratch_proofs/asm1.lean): bridge1_cleared (sorry-free), brickE (sorry-free), sum_div'/depSwap (sorry-free), lhs_isum_collapse (STEP4, sorry-free modulo verified taylorCollapse brick), per_term (reduced to the one bare obstruction), keystone (full STEP0-7 assembly, reduces to per_term). #print axioms: bridge1_cleared = [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound] (CLEAN). keystone/lhs_isum_collapse additionally carry sorryAx only from (a) taylorCollapse [a VERIFIED brick that compiles clean in _scratch_proofs/keystone_base.lean] and (b) the per_term obstruction.

-- Proof it's false: emb(hasseCoeffRepr𝒪) = emb(mk p) = liftBivariate p = eval₂ liftToFunctionField T p
--   = ∑_i lift(p.coeff i)·T^i ;   hasseEvalAtRoot = eval₂ (T/W) p = ∑_i lift(p.coeff i)·T^i·W^(-i).
-- W^N · hasseEvalAtRoot = ∑_i lift(p.coeff i)·T^i·W^(N-i): each monomial T^i carries W^(N-i), but
-- eval₂ T p carries W^0 for every i.  Equal only if p is a Y-monomial.  Concretely for p = a + b·Y
-- (natDegreeY=1): eval₂ T p = lift a + lift b·T, but W^1·hasseEvalAtRoot = W·lift a + lift b·T —
-- equal iff W = 1.  So the un-cleared bridge1 cannot be proven (it is not true).
--
-- The TRUE, VERIFIED bridge is for the CLEARED representative (proves sorry-free, one-liner from the
-- existing in-tree lemma); this is the object the assembly actually needs:
theorem bridge1_cleared (x₀ : F) (R : F[X][X][Y]) (i1 m : ℕ) :
    embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃 H
        (Ideal.Quotient.mk (Ideal.span {H_tilde' H})
          (hasseCoeffRepr𝒪_cleared H x₀ R i1 m) : 𝒪 H)
      = liftToFunctionField (H:=H) H.leadingCoeff
          ^ (Bivariate.natDegreeY
              (Bivariate.evalX (Polynomial.C x₀) (hasseDerivX i1 (hasseDerivY m R))))
        * hasseEvalAtRoot H x₀ R i1 m :=
  embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃_hasseCoeffRepr𝒪_cleared H x₀ R i1 m

    embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃 H (hasseCoeffRepr𝒪 H x₀ R i1 m)
      = Polynomial.eval₂ (liftToFunctionField (H := H)) (functionFieldT (H := H))
          (Bivariate.evalX (Polynomial.C x₀) (hasseDerivX i1 (hasseDerivY m R))) := by

                  PowerSeries.coeff j (βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp))).prod))
      = (lam.parts.countPerms • (lam.parts.map (fun j =>
            PowerSeries.coeff j (βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp))).prod)

theorem lhs_prod_clear (x₀ : F) (R : F[X][X][Y]) (hHyp : ClaimA2.Hypotheses x₀ R H)
    {c : ℕ} (lam : Nat.Partition c) :
    (lam.parts.map (fun j => PowerSeries.coeff j (βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp))).prod
      = embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃 H (partitionProd lam (βHensel H x₀ R hHyp))
          / ((liftToFunctionField (H := H) H.leadingCoeff) ^ (c + lam.parts.card)
              * (embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃 H (ClaimA2.ξ x₀ R H hHyp)) ^ (2 * c - lam.parts.card)) := by
  have hmap : (lam.parts.map (fun j => PowerSeries.coeff j (βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp)))
      = lam.parts.map (fun j =>
          embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃 H (βHensel H x₀ R hHyp j)
            / ((liftToFunctionField (H := H) H.leadingCoeff) ^ (j + 1)
                * (embeddingOf𝒪Into𝕃 H (ClaimA2.ξ x₀ R H hHyp)) ^ (2 * j - 1))) := by
    exact Multiset.map_congr rfl (fun j _ => coeff_βHenselAssembled H x₀ R hHyp j)

-- ---- VERIFIED arithmetic skeleton — SORRY-FREE.  Proves the whole W/ξ/ζ bookkeeping balances
-- ---- GIVEN the bridge (folded into K) and the degree identity N+s+δ=d.  ξ̃ = W^(d-2)·ζ. ----
theorem diag_arith_abstract {L : Type*} [Field L]
    (W ζ K : L) (hWne : W ≠ 0) (hζne : ζ ≠ 0)
    (d s i1 δ N t : ℕ)
    (hd : 2 ≤ d) (hi1 : i1 ≤ t + 1)
    (hs_le : s ≤ 2 * (t + 1 - i1)) (h2i1 : 2 ≤ 2 * i1 + s)
    (hdeg : N + s + δ = d) (hi1δ : 1 ≤ i1 + δ) :
    K / (W ^ ((t + 1 - i1) + s) * (W ^ (d - 2) * ζ) ^ (2 * (t + 1 - i1) - s))
    = ζ * (W ^ (i1 + δ - 1) * (W ^ (d - 2) * ζ) ^ (2 * i1 + s - 2)
            * (W ^ N * K)
            * (W ^ (t + 1 + 1) * (W ^ (d - 2) * ζ) ^ (2 * (t + 1) - 1))⁻¹) := by
  have key : ∀ a b : ℕ, (W ^ (d - 2) * ζ) ^ a = W ^ ((d - 2) * a) * ζ ^ a := by
    intro a b; rw [mul_pow, ← pow_mul]
  rw [key (2 * (t + 1 - i1) - s) 0, key (2 * i1 + s - 2) 0, key (2 * (t + 1) - 1) 0]
  field_simp
  ring_nf
  have hbracket : (1 + t - i1) * 2 - s + (s + i1 * 2 - 2) = t * 2 := by omega
  have hWexp : 2 + t + (d - 2) * (2 + t * 2 - 1)
      = (d - 2) * ((1 + t - i1) * 2 - s) + (d - 2) * (s + i1 * 2 - 2) + (1 + t - i1) + s
        + (i1 + δ - 1) + N := by
    rw [← Nat.mul_add, hbracket]
    have hexp : (d - 2) * (2 + t * 2 - 1) = (d - 2) * (t * 2) + (d - 2) := by
      rw [← Nat.mul_succ]; congr 1; omega
    rw [hexp]; omega
  have hζexp : 2 + t * 2 - 1 = 1 + ((1 + t - i1) * 2 - s) + (s + i1 * 2 - 2) := by omega
  calc K * W ^ 2 * W ^ t * W ^ ((d - 2) * (2 + t * 2 - 1)) * ζ ^ (2 + t * 2 - 1)
      = K * (W ^ (2 + t + (d - 2) * (2 + t * 2 - 1))) * ζ ^ (2 + t * 2 - 1) := by
        rw [pow_add, pow_add]; ring
    _ = K * (W ^ ((d - 2) * ((1 + t - i1) * 2 - s) + (d - 2) * (s + i1 * 2 - 2) + (1 + t - i1) + s
              + (i1 + δ - 1) + N))
          * ζ ^ (1 + ((1 + t - i1) * 2 - s) + (s + i1 * 2 - 2)) := by rw [hWexp, hζexp]
    _ = K * W ^ ((d - 2) * ((1 + t - i1) * 2 - s)) * W ^ ((d - 2) * (s + i1 * 2 - 2)) *
              W ^ (1 + t - i1) * W ^ s * W ^ (i1 + δ - 1) * W ^ N *
            ζ * ζ ^ ((1 + t - i1) * 2 - s) * ζ ^ (s + i1 * 2 - 2) := by
        simp only [pow_add, pow_one]; ring
